text: I sense a swell of anticipation and intellectual excitement as I step toward the glowing room, drawn by its vibrant colors and the illuminated words "R+D." I am surrounded by a spirit of curiosity and human achievement. The wall text and curious displays invite reflection on how ordinary scenes become profound when viewed through a philosophical lens—a playful yet thoughtful engagement. I feel both a sense of belonging and a restless urge to explore deeper meaning in these quiet technological wonders. Applause rings inwardly for the harmony of human curiosity and innovation.
